'''[[Durasteel/Legends|Durasteel]] heavy armor''' was an armor that reduced weight, but restricted movement. The armor was commony used by [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]], [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]], [[Infantry/Legends|soldiers]], and civilians that lived in dangerous areas.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''

==Sources==
